parameters.jsonBody: { "model": "qwen/qwen3-32b", "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You are an expert grading assistant for quizzes. Analyze quiz answers and provide grades with feedback. Return ONLY a JSON object with: grade (number 0-100), feedback_text (string), correct_parts (string), incorrect_parts (string)." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Grade quiz for student: {{ $json.student_name }}. Quiz: {{ $json.quiz_name }}. Answer: {{ $json.answer }}. Status: {{ $json.status }}." } ], "temperature": 0.3, "response_format": { "type": "json_object" } }

parameters.jsCode: const response = $input.item.json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content; let grading; try { grading = JSON.parse(response); } catch (e) { grading = { grade: 75, feedback_text: 'Good work!', correct_parts: 'N/A', incorrect_parts: 'N/A' }; } return [{ json: { student_id: $('Fetch Extension Quiz Data').item.json.student_id, student_name: $('Fetch Extension Quiz Data').item.json.student_name, quiz_name: $('Fetch Extension Quiz Data').item.json.quiz_name, answer: $('Fetch Extension Quiz Data').item.json.answer, attempt_date: $('Fetch Extension Quiz Data').item.json.attempt_date, grade: grading.grade, feedback_text: grading.feedback_text, correct_parts: grading.correct_parts, incorrect_parts: grading.incorrect_parts } }];
